channel.title: +News rags on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +News rags on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Propaganda firms
item.description: Atlantic council Vid2021 Shady characters on board While not every single member of The Atlantic Council is a democracy toppling, war monging, misinformant kidnapper, they certainly have an agenda (mostly big business and state interests). They’re not at all objective and there’s more than enough shady characters on the board for everyone to be concerned. Shady funding Weapons manufacturers twenty-five foreign governments Digital Forensic Research Lab (DFRLab) Supposed purpose: study disinformation in open source environments and report on democratic processes.
